headline: Starboard’s Cost-Cut Demands Could Be A Game Changer For Lamb Weston Holdings (LW)
summary: On April 30, 2026, activist investor Starboard Value LP sent a letter to Lamb Weston Holdings’ board urging a reset of strategy, stronger cost discipline, and clearer financial targets after what it described as years of underperformance and an insufficient US$250 million cost-savings program. Starboard’s push for zero-based budgeting and margin-focused goals highlights concerns over SG&A expenses that have nearly tripled over a decade despite only modest volume expansion, raising questions...
